added: Aethvion Code IDE: Full standalone IDE built on the Monaco editor engine (VS Code), running on port 8083
Aethvion Code IDE: AI copilot with chat, explain, fix, complete, and refactor — all streamed via SSE
Aethvion Code IDE: File creation from chat — AI uses ### FILE: markers and files are written to disk and opened automatically
Aethvion Code IDE: Code execution for Python, Node.js, and Bash/Shell with live-streamed output panel
Aethvion Code IDE: Syntax highlighting and language detection for 30+ file types via Monaco language maps
Aethvion Code IDE: Resizable 3-panel layout — file tree sidebar, Monaco editor, AI chat panel
Aethvion Code IDE: File tree with context menu (open, rename, delete, new file/folder, copy path) and inline rename on double-click
Aethvion Code IDE: Tab bar with dirty state indicators (●) and per-file Monaco models with saved view states
Aethvion Code IDE: Project persistence — open tabs and active file saved to data/code/projects/ per workspace
Aethvion Code IDE: Workspace persistence — last opened workspace and recent workspaces list saved to data/code/settings.json
Aethvion Code IDE: Recent workspaces modal with time-ago labels and per-entry remove buttons
Aethvion Code IDE: Native OS folder picker (tkinter) accessible via Browse button in workspace modal
Aethvion Code IDE: Project-aware AI — workspace file structure injected into every chat system prompt automatically
Aethvion Code IDE: /api/settings, /api/project, /api/project/scan, and /api/fs/browse endpoints
Aethvion Code IDE: Start_Code.bat one-click Windows launcher mirroring the suite launcher pattern
Aethvion VTuber: Live tracking mode — VTuber viewer browser connects directly to Tracking WebSocket with auto-reconnect
Aethvion VTuber: /api/tracking/info and /api/tracking/status discovery endpoints for browser-side connection
Aethvion VTuber: Live inspector panel — status dot (connecting/connected/error), connect/disconnect button, live parameter readout
Aethvion VTuber: tracking/bridge.py upgraded from stub to full async WebSocket client with exponential backoff reconnect (up to 30s)
Core: Local model context window (n_ctx) increased from 2048 to 4096 tokens for better code generation output
Suite Hub: Integrated Settings and Version management sections directly into the Suite dashboard
Files: Refactored navigation into a dropdown with dedicated sub-tabs for Output, Screenshots, Camera, and Uploads
Settings: Dual-tab configuration UI for Aethvion Suite and Assistant with hardware toggle support
improved: Aethvion Code IDE: max_tokens raised to 2048 for AI streaming — prevents response truncation when generating full files
Aethvion Code IDE: Chat system prompt instructs the AI to produce complete files using markers, never truncate, and create all files in one response
Aethvion Code IDE: Workspace modal redesigned — quick roots section, scrollable recent list, free-form path input, and OS Browse button
Aethvion Code IDE: openFile() accepts a silent flag used during workspace restore to avoid activating mid-load
Aethvion VTuber: formats/__init__.py fixed — resolved ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'formats.specter_format' startup crash
Aethvion VTuber: VTuber and Tracking ports separated (8081 / 8082) to prevent conflict when both apps are running
Aethvion VTuber: Start_Code.bat echo fixed — escaped > in URL echo to prevent 'filename syntax incorrect' Windows error
README: Updated to reflect Code IDE, three interaction modes, local model support, correct directory structure, and launcher table
Blackjack: Standardized gameplay with a hidden dealer card and aesthetic in-field result displays
Branding: Refined version control display name and repository links to Aethvion Suite
Infrastructure: Unified all sub-apps (VTuber, Tracking, Photo, Audio, Finance) to use port 8081 as their primary negotiate port
Tracking: Restored MediaPipe backend support by resolving project dependency omissions
System: Stabilized core by ensuring python-multipart and drive-info linting issues are resolved
changed: Aethvion Tracking: Default port changed from 8081 to 8082 (env: SYNAPSE_PORT) to avoid conflict with VTuber
Infrastructure: Code IDE runtime data stored under data/code/ — settings.json for global state, projects/{key}.json per workspace

interface.desc: Full two-way communication with Discord servers and secured direct-messaging tools.

assistant.desc: Can help you with your tasks and understanding Aethvion Suite and its features.

infrastructure.desc: Drop-in document processing and semantic search capabilities.

features.desc: Real-time detection of system-wide media playback (Spotify, YouTube, etc.).

planned.name: System Task Scheduler

modules.name: Aethvion VTuber

features.desc: 8-mode editor for mesh, bone, weight, physics, and preview workflows.

features.name: AI-Assisted Rigging

features.name: High-Performance Rendering

features.name: Dynamic Physics

features.name: Live Tracking Mode

planned.name: AI Character Asset Generation

features.name: Precision AI Tracking

features.name: Flexible Input Sources

features.name: Real-time Monitoring
features.desc: Verify tracking alignment with low-latency visual feedback.

features.name: Resource Management

features.name: WebSocket Parameter Stream

wip.name: Professional Backend Support
wip.desc: Implementing backends for professional desktop-based tracking systems.

planned.name: Full Body Tracking

modules.name: Aethvion Code IDE
modules.desc: A full AI-powered IDE built on the Monaco editor engine — write, run, and collaborate with AI directly in the browser.

features.name: Monaco Editor
features.desc: VS Code-grade editor with syntax highlighting for 30+ languages, bracket colorization, IntelliSense suggestions, and smooth scrolling.

features.name: AI Copilot
features.desc: Streaming chat, explain, fix, complete, and refactor — all powered by whichever provider or local model is configured.

features.name: File Creation from Chat
features.desc: AI uses ### FILE: markers in its response — files are written to disk and opened in tabs automatically.

features.name: Code Execution
features.desc: Run Python, Node.js, and Bash/Shell scripts directly from the IDE with live-streamed stdout/stderr output.

features.name: Project Context Injection
features.desc: Workspace file structure is automatically included in every AI system prompt so the model always knows what's in the project.

features.name: Persistent Workspace State
features.desc: Open tabs, active file, and recent workspaces are saved to data/code/ and restored on next launch.

features.name: File Tree & Context Menu
features.desc: Recursive file tree with open, rename (inline), delete, new file/folder, and copy path — all from right-click.

features.name: Resizable 3-Panel Layout
features.desc: File tree, Monaco editor, and AI chat panel — all independently resizable with drag handles.

wip.name: Diff View
wip.desc: Side-by-side diff for reviewing AI-suggested changes before applying them.

wip.name: Multi-File Refactor
wip.desc: Coordinate AI changes across multiple open files in a single instruction.

planned.name: Git Integration
planned.desc: Stage, commit, and view diffs without leaving the IDE.

planned.name: Extension System
planned.desc: Plugin architecture for adding language servers, linters, and custom tools.

modules.name: Aethvion Audio
modules.desc: Professional multi-track audio editor with waveform visualization, effects pipeline, and multi-format export.

features.name: Multi-Track Timeline
features.desc: Full multi-track editor with per-track volume, mute, solo, and pan — insert tracks at the playhead position.

features.name: High-Precision Waveform Visualization
features.desc: 2000-point filled gradient waveform rendering with viewport-based ruler accurate at any zoom level.

features.name: Region-Based Editing
features.desc: Click-drag to select regions for trimming, silencing, or targeted effect application.

features.name: Effects Pipeline
features.desc: Fade In/Out, Normalize, Gain (±20 dB), Reverse, Speed control (0.25×–4×), and Crop Silence.

features.name: Format Tools
features.desc: Stereo-to-Mono and Mono-to-Stereo conversion with full resampling support (8kHz–96kHz).

features.name: Undo & Reset
features.desc: Unlimited undo history with one-click reset to the original loaded file.

features.name: Multi-Format Export
features.desc: Export edited audio as WAV (native), MP3, or OGG (FFmpeg required for compressed formats).

wip.name: Virtual Waveform Rendering
wip.desc: Viewport-only canvas rendering for long clips to eliminate blurriness at extreme zoom levels.

planned.name: Spectral View
planned.desc: Frequency-domain visualization for surgical noise removal and EQ editing.

modules.name: Aethvion Drive Info
modules.desc: WinDirStat-style interactive disk space analyzer — scan drives and visualize storage usage.

features.name: Interactive Disk Scanner
features.desc: Recursively scans any path and presents a sortable, drillable tree of files and folders by size.

features.name: .eathscan Archive Format
features.desc: Scan results saved as structured JSON archives with companion .meta sidecars for instant listing without re-parsing.

features.name: Display-Optimized Variants
features.desc: Intelligent tree pruning aggregates small items into placeholders — reduces file size up to 291× for safe browser loading.

features.name: Crash-Safe Large File Streaming
features.desc: FileResponse streaming prevents browser OOM crashes when loading large scans.

wip.name: Treemap Visualization
wip.desc: WinDirStat-style colored block treemap for instant visual identification of large files.

planned.name: Duplicate File Detection
planned.desc: Hash-based scanning to identify and surface duplicate files across scanned paths.

planned.name: Scheduled Scans
planned.desc: Automate recurring scans and diff results to track disk growth over time.

modules.name: Aethvion Finance
modules.desc: Professional multi-view financial dashboard for tracking net worth, budgets, investments, and goals.

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.desc: KPI cards (net worth, income, expenses, savings rate) with net worth trend and spending donut charts.

features.name: Transaction Management
features.desc: Full CRUD transaction log with category tagging, date filtering, and search.

features.name: Account Tracking
features.desc: Manage multiple accounts (checking, savings, investment, credit) with live balance totals.

features.name: Budget Planner
features.desc: Monthly budget targets per category with spend-vs-budget bar charts.

features.name: Goals Tracker
features.desc: Define savings goals with target amounts and deadlines — track progress visually.

features.name: Portfolio Tab
features.desc: Track investment holdings (Stocks, ETFs, Crypto, Bonds) with allocation donut chart and gain/loss calculations.

features.name: Live Price Refresh
features.desc: One-click market price update for all holdings via Yahoo Finance (yfinance) — no API key required.

features.name: Analytics View
features.desc: Income vs. expenses bar chart, category breakdown, cash flow line chart, and accounts distribution.

features.name: Project Storage
features.desc: Save and load named financial snapshots in the custom .aethfinance format with atomic autosave.

wip.name: Recurring Transactions
wip.desc: Define recurring income and expense rules that auto-populate the transaction log.

planned.name: CSV Import / Export
planned.desc: Import bank statement CSVs and export transaction history for external tools.

planned.name: Tax Report Generator
planned.desc: Summarize capital gains, income, and deductible expenses for tax preparation.

modules.name: Aethvion Photo
modules.desc: Universal workspace for text-to-image synthesis and manipulation.

features.name: Layer-Based Canvas Engine
features.desc: Professional grade canvas supporting multiple layers, transparency, and non-destructive filtering.

features.name: AI Background Removal
features.desc: Integrated 'Remove Background' tool powered by high-precision AI models.

features.name: Live Filtering
features.desc: Real-time CSS-based filters (Brightness, Contrast, Saturation, etc.) applied per-layer.

wip.name: Advanced AI Generation
wip.desc: Deeper integration with local and cloud-based image gen models.
